response.original_title: Kingdom of Heaven (Director's Cut Roadshow Version)
response.overview: Experience Ridley Scott's Director's Cut of this spectacular epic of courage, honor and adventure. Orlando Bloom stars as Balian, a young Frenchman in Medieval Jerusalem during the Crusades. Having lost everything, Balian finds redemption through a heroic fight — against overwhelming forces — to save his people and fulfil his destiny as a knight.
response.title: Kingdom of Heaven (Director's Cut Roadshow Version)
